info.title: Electric Cloud API
info.description: Control plane API for Electric Cloud. Manage projects, environments and services.

tags.name: Projects
tags.description: Project management. Projects belong to a workspace and contain environments.

tags.name: Environments
tags.description: Environment management. Environments belong to a project and contain services.

tags.name: Services
tags.description: Common service operations that work across all service types.

tags.name: Claimable Sources
tags.description: Endpoints for creating a database and a postgres service that can be claimed into a workspace. Claim ID can be redeemed at [https://dashboard.electric-sql.cloud/claim](https://dashboard.electric-sql.cloud/claim)
